title: Crispy Tofu Croquettes with Gooey Sauce
description: A festive twist on traditional croquettes, featuring crispy tofu and served with a side of gooey sauce for dipping.
instructions: 1. Preheat oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
2. Cut the tofu into small cubes and coat with flour, shaking off excess.
3. Dip the floured tofu in the beaten egg and then coat with breadcrumbs.
4. Fry the coated tofu in batches until crispy and golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
5. Drain the fried tofu on paper towels.
6. If using store-bought croquettes, cook according to package instructions.
7. Serve the crispy tofu croquettes with gooey sauce for dipping.
